# ADR Template (Lightweight Stub)

> **Note:** For feature-specific ADR generation with auto-cascade to AD2, use the Archon workflow via [archon/SKILL.md](archon/SKILL.md).
>

>
> This stub template is provided for standalone/non-feature-specific quick-start reference only.
